name: web-access
description: Unified web access skill evaluation cases covering Exa source-first and Grok live synthesis commands

cases.name: Official Documentation Lookup
cases.description: Agent needs to find official documentation for a specific library or framework
cases.scenario: User asks: 'Find the official OpenClaw documentation on authentication'

expected_routing.reasoning: Official documentation requires source-first search with domain filtering

acceptance_criteria: Uses docs command with default domain filter

cases.name: General Source-First Search
cases.description: Agent needs to search for authoritative sources across the web
cases.scenario: User asks: 'Search for articles about Rust async programming patterns'

expected_routing.reasoning: General web search for authoritative sources without domain restriction

cases.example_command: web-access search --query 'Rust async programming patterns' --num 5 --type neural
acceptance_criteria: Uses search command without default domain filter

cases.name: Article Text Extraction
cases.description: Agent needs to extract full text content from search results
cases.scenario: User asks: 'Find and extract text from articles about GraphQL best practices'

expected_routing.reasoning: Extracting article text requires Exa's content extraction capability

acceptance_criteria: Uses extract command with default text extraction

cases.name: Find Similar Pages
cases.description: Agent needs to find pages similar to a given URL
cases.scenario: User asks: 'Find pages similar to this tutorial: https://example.com/tutorial'

expected_routing.reasoning: Similar page discovery is an Exa-specific capability

acceptance_criteria: Uses similar command with URL parameter

cases.name: Latest News Search
cases.description: Agent needs to find breaking news or recent developments
cases.scenario: User asks: 'What are the latest developments in AI regulation?'

expected_routing.reasoning: Breaking news requires live synthesis with real-time web access

acceptance_criteria: Returns synthesized news summary with sources

cases.name: Social Media Discourse
cases.description: Agent needs to understand community sentiment and discussions
cases.scenario: User asks: 'What is the developer community saying about the new Python release?'

expected_routing.reasoning: Social discourse analysis requires live synthesis of community discussions

acceptance_criteria: Returns synthesized community sentiment with sources

cases.name: Broad Live Research
cases.description: Agent needs to synthesize information across multiple sources in real-time
cases.scenario: User asks: 'Research current state of quantum computing applications'

expected_routing.reasoning: Broad synthesis across diverse sources requires live research capability

cases.example_command: web-access research --query 'current state quantum computing practical applications'
acceptance_criteria: Returns comprehensive synthesized analysis with diverse sources

cases.name: Official vs Community Documentation
cases.description: Agent needs to compare official documentation with community interpretations
cases.scenario: User asks: 'Compare official Docker documentation with community guides on networking'

expected_routing.reasoning: Comparing official and community sources requires live synthesis

cases.example_command: web-access docs-compare --query 'Docker networking official docs vs community guides'
acceptance_criteria: Returns comparative analysis with both official and community sources

cases.name: Multiple Output Formats
cases.description: Agent needs to output results in different formats based on task
cases.scenario: User asks: 'Find Rust resources and give me just the URLs'

expected_routing.reasoning: Source-first search with URLs-only output format

acceptance_criteria: Outputs only URLs (not full JSON or plain text)

cases.name: Multi-Profile Failover
cases.description: CLI handles rate limits gracefully with multiple profiles
cases.scenario: First profile hits rate limit during search

expected_routing.reasoning: Failover to next available profile on rate limit

acceptance_criteria: Detects retryable failure (rate limit, quota, auth)

routing_decision_points: Source-first (authoritative, official docs, text extraction) → Exa
Live synthesis (news, social, research, comparison) → Grok
Similar pages, domain-filtered searches → Exa only
validation_notes: Eval cases focus on routing decisions and command examples
Network-dependent live results are not evaluated for correctness
Failover behavior is validated through mock HTTP test servers
Output format tests verify structure, not content accuracy
